completed_tasks.name: Client Feedback Copy Glyph and Month Page

remaining_tasks.name: Review the handoff PR and confirm a clean checkout
Run paused screenshot and physical-device review
Decide and execute or defer selective zodiac rotor integration
Merge the feature branch to main and verify GitHub Pages

blockers.description: The newest application implementation is on the feature branch but not deployed from main.
blockers.workaround: Review the draft PR and confirm a clean checkout before branch or worktree changes.

blockers.description: The isolated rotor is not integrated and may conflict with the completed month gallery.
blockers.workaround: Port selectively behind the existing zodiac boundary and rerun all flow and reduced-motion checks.

blockers.description: Production distribution requires library asset and content review.
blockers.workaround: Keep the build labeled as an internal prototype until reviews are complete.

human_actions_pending.action: Review final mobile screenshots and physical-device keyboard behavior
human_actions_pending.context: Screenshot work was explicitly paused during closeout.
Rotor remains isolated from the current app.

human_actions_pending.action: Resolve production licensing provenance and subject-matter review
human_actions_pending.context: Prototype dependencies assets and spiritual content are not production-cleared.

decisions.decision: Treat the published client-feedback feature branch as the handoff source of truth.
decisions.rationale: It implements accepted feedback and passes automated and portrait-browser checks.

decisions.decision: Keep the zodiac rotor isolated at handoff.
decisions.rationale: A deliberate integration decision is safer than merging a competing prototype wholesale.

decisions.decision: Use the shared GitHub Pages workflow as deployment truth.
decisions.rationale: Only parent-repo main deploys the public monorepo site.

next_action: Read README.md and .planning/.continue-here.md; confirm a clean checkout; run npm run test:flow and npm run build; review the draft PR before inspecting the rotor worktree.
context_notes: The app through Phase 4 is captured on the handoff feature branch. Phase 5, final screenshots, merge to main, public deployment verification, and production legal/editorial review remain explicit.
